title: Lucky Strike
description: Randomizes critical hits and removes crit jumping, adds 2 new enchantments related to critical hits too + config for every feature
body:
**Lucky Strike** replaces Minecraft’s jump based critical hits with a configurable chance based alternative.
Originally created for my modpack.
## Features

### Crit System Overhaul

Disables vanilla jump crits.

Adds a configurable chance based crit mechanic (default config: 10% chance for 150% additional damage).

**Luck** increases your crit chance.

New Enchantments (compatible with Enchantment Descriptions)

Swift Strike: Gain speed when landing a critical hit with a sword.

Impact Haste: Gain haste when landing a critical hit with tools.

##  Configuration

**All** values (crit chance, damage multiplier, enchantment duration/amplifier) are fully configurable via the mod’s config file (critmod-common.toml).

###  Compatibility
Server side required

Client is optional, without the client mod, enchantments will display as raw translation keys.
